eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Alameda; Kern; Los Angeles; San Joaquin, CA; at 3:15 AM on JUL 1, 2026 Effective until 5:15 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
AN AMBER ALERT IS BEING ISSUED BY THE CALIFORNIA HIGHWAY PATROL ON BEHALF OF THE HAYWARD POLICE DEPARTMENT.

ON JUNE 28, 2026, AT 1 00 AM, MAXENCE SIROIS WAS ABDUCTED FROM HAYWARD, CALIFORNIA. MAXENCE SIROIS IS A 3 YEAR OLD WHITE MALE, BALD WITH BLUE EYES.

THE SUSPECT, MARIN KAZAKOVA, IS A 42 YEAR OLD WHITE FEMALE, STANDING 5 FEET 6 INCHES TALL, WEIGHING 128 POUNDS WITH BROWN HAIR AND BROWN EYES.

THE SUSPECT AND VICTIM ARE BELIEVED TO BE DRIVING IN A WHITE 2016 MAZDA CX5 SUV, LICENSE PLATE 7SJW989.

IF SEEN CALL 9 1 1
